/usr/bin/cc -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/empty.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/empty.dir/empty.c.o CMakeFiles/empty.dir/__/deps/tinycthread.c.o CMakeFiles/empty.dir/__/deps/glad.c.o -o empty  ../src/libglfw3.a -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic -lm -ldl -lX11 -lXrandr -lXinerama -lXxf86vm -lXcursor
